mapper.select: select o.outbound_id, o.outbound_date, o.outbound_request_date, o.outbound_status, o.outbound_amount, p.product_id, p.product_name, o.reject_reason_message from outbound_table o join product p on o.product_id = p.product_id where p.product_id in (select product_id from product where business_id = (select business_id from business_table where user_id = #{userId}))
